description: CompositionCharcoal grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline that has black tape detailing on the inseam and slightly distressed look graphic with flock detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print If you believe that life is just one big slap stick comedy, then this round neck t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the slighty distressed look of the Mr. Funny graphic with flock print detailing will remind everyone to take it easy now and then. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders "
